zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Montgomery於1314年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾蕾托 庫布利時，他的父親William Montgomery35歲，母親Johanna Stafford36歲。他於1343年1月與Alice結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1374年9月在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾艾可頓享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Montgomery was born in 1314, in Little Cubley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Montgomery, was 35 and his mother, Johanna Stafford, was 36. He married Alice in January 1343. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in September 1374, in Ecton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Montgomery(이)가 1314년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 리틀 c블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Montgomery(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Stafford(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1343년 1월 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1374년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 크턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.
